sentences.english: Do you prefer using cash or digital payment methods?
sentences.korean: 현금과 디지털 결제 중 어느 것을 선호합니까?

sentences.english: I strongly prefer digital payment methods like mobile pay and credit cards.
sentences.korean: 모바일 페이와 신용카드 같은 디지털 결제 방식을 강하게 선호해요.

sentences.english: First it's incredibly convenient — I just tap my phone and the payment is done in a second.
sentences.korean: 첫째 엄청나게 편리해요 — 폰을 터치하면 1초 만에 결제가 끝나요.

sentences.english: I don't have to worry about carrying bills or coins or getting change back.
sentences.korean: 지폐나 동전을 가지고 다니거나 거스름돈을 받을 걱정을 할 필요가 없어요.

sentences.english: Second digital payments automatically track my spending so I can easily see where my money goes each month.
sentences.korean: 둘째 디지털 결제는 지출을 자동으로 추적해서 매달 돈이 어디로 가는지 쉽게 볼 수 있어요.

sentences.english: This has actually helped me save money because I'm more aware of my spending habits.
sentences.korean: 이것은 실제로 돈을 아끼는 데 도움이 됐어요. 소비 습관을 더 의식하게 되니까요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Person Who Has Influenced You
News from Social Media vs. Traditional Media
